scope.implementedChanges: No implementation scope was supplied; this run records validation evidence only.

Unit tests.command: npm run test:evidence; npm run test:run

GitHub Pages build.command: npm run build:pages; npm run test:e2e:pages

E2E.command: npm run test:e2e; npm run test:e2e:full

UX.command: npm run test:click-audit; npm run test:route-crawl; npm run test:forms; npm run test:overlays; npm run test:responsive:interactions; npm run test:keyboard; npm run test:copy; npm run test:errors; npm run test:ux

Release validation.command: npm run test:release-candidate; npm run test:release-candidate:pages; npm run validate:release

manualUxReview.note: A human reviewer must change this record only after completing the structured review. Automation and Codex cannot self-approve subjective UX.

manualSecurityReview.note: A human reviewer must update this record after completing the security review. Automation cannot approve it.

manualContentReview.note: A human reviewer must update this record after completing the content review. Automation cannot approve it.
